title: ScrollArea Component
content:
## ScrollArea Component This component provides a customizable scrollable area for your application, built using Radix UI's ScrollArea primitive. ### Purpose The `ScrollArea` component allows you to implement scrollable content containers with custom scrollbar styling. It enhances the user experience by providing a consistent and visually appealing way to handle overflowing content. ### Key Exports * **`ScrollArea`**: The main component for creating a scrollable area. * **`ScrollBar`**: A component for rendering the scrollbar within the `ScrollArea`. ### `ScrollArea` Props Accepts all props from `ScrollAreaPrimitive.Root`. * **`className`**: Custom CSS class to style the scroll area. * **`children`**: The content to be displayed within the scrollable area. ### `ScrollBar` Props Accepts all props from `ScrollAreaPrimitive.ScrollAreaScrollbar`. * **`className`**: Custom CSS class to style the scrollbar. * **`orientation`**: The orientation of the scrollbar. Can be `'vertical'` (default) or `'horizontal'`. ### Usage Example ```tsx import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area'; function MyComponent() { return (

Tags

{Array.from({ length: 50 }).map((_, i, k0) => (
Tag {i + 1}
))}
); } ``` This example creates a `ScrollArea` with a fixed height and width, containing a list of tags that will become scrollable if they exceed the container's dimensions. The default vertical scrollbar will be applied.
